name: Acetone
immediate_actions: Alert authorized site safety personnel and emergency responders.
Move people away from the affected area if it can be done without entering the hazard zone.
Keep unprotected personnel upwind and away from vapors.
Remove potential ignition sources only through approved human safety procedures.
forbidden_actions: Do not authorize equipment shutdown through Sentinel-X.
Do not operate valves through Sentinel-X.
Do not handle, move, or contain the chemical based on Sentinel-X output.
Do not enter the hazard area without authorized training and PPE.
Do not use open flames or create sparks near the suspected release.
evacuation_guidance: Use site emergency procedures to isolate the area and evacuate nearby personnel upwind. Escalate to authorized responders for perimeter and re-entry decisions.
